title: BrandApp Xcode Cloud 云打包路线
summary: BrandApp 为 DHB 定制品牌新增 Xcode Cloud 云打包路线：从本地配置生成 cloud-build 分支，镜像到 GitHub，Xcode Cloud 从 GitHub 分支构建；Pods 已纳入镜像，云端不再跑 pod install。

gates.name: Intent / Intake
gates.purpose: 记录用户目标、任务类型、任务等级和是否需要在 task board 展示完整流程。

gates.name: Discovery
gates.purpose: 记录 superpowers 调研过程中选中的项目、场景、规则、skill、证据来源和未知项。

gates.name: Plan / Product UI
gates.purpose: 记录 superpowers 输出的产品、UI、技术方案或交互原型，以及用户确认点。

gates.name: Development
gates.purpose: 记录当前开发项目、写入范围、使用的 superpower、验证预期和恢复位置。

gates.name: Integration
gates.purpose: 记录单项目运行、跨项目联调、环境切换、阻塞项和处理后恢复步骤。

gates.name: Acceptance
gates.purpose: 记录对照需求、UI、接口、diff 和测试结果的验收状态。

gates.name: Run / Package Archive
gates.purpose: 记录调试运行、测试/预发/正式打包、最终验证、已知缺口和交接说明。

projectProgress.summary: CloudBuildGitSpec 已保留 Xcode 工程引用的 README 资源，并在 snapshot 生成后自动修补 YYText 链式比较、AFNetworking netinet6 私有头、Xcode Cloud archive 阶段签名配置以及 MsePaySDK Swift compatibility force-load 链接配置；单测和 PackageTool macOS build 通过。

已用完整 cloud-build/brandapp 基线重建 cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian 品牌镜像，补回 README 资源并修复 YYText 链式比较、AFNetworking netinet6 私有头 import、Release entitlements/signing 配置和 MsePaySDK Swift compatibility force-load 链接配置；本地按 Xcode Cloud 参数 archive 通过，并推送到 GitHub commit 05cc020。
已记录 Xcode Cloud exit 65 根因、修复动作、验证命令和 GitHub 推送结果。

notes.text: 补记本次漏写的任务状态，并验证 contextctl task start/update/finish 以后可作为自动写 task 的固定入口。
根据用户纠正，把 task 自动创建规则从 BrandApp/Xcode Cloud 示例泛化为任意窗口、任意项目的默认需求入口：Jira/issue 编码、新模块、大需求、多文件能力、跨会话工作默认开 task。

Xcode Cloud 构建版本 5 进入 xcodebuild archive 后失败，截图只显示 Command exited with non-zero exit-code: 65；post-clone 脚本不存在、package dependencies 和 project/workflow configuration 均已通过。下一步需要展开 archive 子日志或下载 xcresult 定位真实编译/签名错误。

定位 Xcode Cloud exit 65 根因：GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian 旧分支是缺文件 snapshot，且 BrandApp 过滤 *.md 时漏掉了 Xcode 工程引用的 README 资源。本地在 DHB-XcodeCloud-Mirror 以 cloud-build/brandapp 完整基线重建品牌差异，补回 README，DHB Release 真机 build 通过；已提交 14c4d66 并 force-with-lease 推到 GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian。BrandApp 已调整 CloudBuildGitSpec 保留必要 README 资源，CloudBuildGitSpecTests 和 PackageTool macOS build 通过。

Xcode Cloud 构建版本 6 失败在 YYText 第三方库：YYTextLayout.m 1508/1510/1516/1518 使用链式比较，被云端新 Clang 报 Chained comparison 错误。查公开源确认 CocoaPods YYText 最新仍为 1.0.7 且最后发布于 2016，无官方新版可直接升级解决；当前采用最小兼容补丁，将四处表达式改为三目选择。DHB-XcodeCloud-Mirror 本地 Release 真机 build 通过，GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian 已推送 49869c5。BrandApp snapshot 生成流程也加入 YYText 兼容 patch，避免以后重新生成 cloud-build 分支复发。

Xcode Cloud 构建版本 7 继续失败在 AFNetworking 4.0.1：AFNetworkReachabilityManager.m:26 和 AFHTTPSessionManager.m:32 直接 import <netinet6/in6.h>，新 SDK 模块检查报 Use of private header from outside its module。Xcode 26.2 iPhoneOS SDK 的 netinet6/in6.h 明确提示不要直接 include，应 include <netinet/in.h>；AFNetworking 源码本来已经有 <netinet/in.h>。已在 DHB-XcodeCloud-Mirror 删除两处私有头 import，本地 Release 真机 build 通过；BrandApp snapshot 生成流程也加入 AFNetworking 兼容 patch。GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian 已推送 5e448eb。

Xcode Cloud build 8 moved past third-party compile errors and failed at archive exit 65. Local reproduction with the same cloud archive arguments failed because CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=- cannot archive DHB entitlements. Verified compile/archive succeeds when archive-stage signing is disabled. Pushed GitHub mirror commit ced459d to cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian: Release DHB.entitlements aps-environment=production, Release CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=Apple Distribution, CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO. BrandApp snapshot patch rules updated and CloudBuildGitSpecTests passed.

Xcode Cloud build 9 failed at DHB link phase with undefined __swift_FORCE_LOAD_$_swiftCompatibility50/51/56/Concurrency/DynamicReplacements symbols. Root cause evidence: MsePaySDK.xcframework is a Swift binary framework and contains swiftCompatibility force-load symbols. Added Release LIBRARY_SEARCH_PATHS "$(TOOLCHAIN_DIR)/usr/lib/swift/$(PLATFORM_NAME)" and explicit -lswiftCompatibility50/-lswiftCompatibility51/-lswiftCompatibility56/-lswiftCompatibilityConcurrency/-lswiftCompatibilityDynamicReplacements to DHB mirror. Local archive with same Xcode Cloud arguments succeeded. Pushed GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian commit 0f26bd0. BrandApp snapshot patch rules updated and CloudBuildGitSpecTests + PackageTool macOS build passed.

Xcode Cloud build 10 still failed with undefined __swift_FORCE_LOAD_$_swiftCompatibility50/51/56/Concurrency/DynamicReplacements. Follow-up root cause: the previous -lswiftCompatibility* flags were order-sensitive and did not force archive members into the final link on Xcode Cloud. Replaced those Release OTHER_LDFLAGS entries with -force_load full paths to $(TOOLCHAIN_DIR)/usr/lib/swift/$(PLATFORM_NAME)/libswiftCompatibility*.a. Local archive with the same Xcode Cloud arguments succeeded, CloudBuildGitSpecTests passed, PackageTool macOS build passed, and GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian was pushed to commit 05cc020.

Xcode Cloud build 11 still failed with the same swiftCompatibility undefined symbols. Root cause of previous failed fix: commit 05cc020 inserted force_load into the DHB target Debug build configuration, while Xcode Cloud archive uses the Release configuration, so Release OTHER_LDFLAGS did not contain force_load. Patched the Release DHB target configuration and verified with xcodebuild -showBuildSettings that Release OTHER_LDFLAGS now contains -force_load full paths for libswiftCompatibility50/51/56/Concurrency/DynamicReplacements. Local archive with Xcode Cloud-style arguments succeeded. Pushed GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian commit f979f01.

blockers.text: Xcode Cloud archive exit 65，当前截图未暴露底层错误行。

recoveryPoint: GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian 已更新到 f979f01；下一步在 App Store Connect 对 cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian 从最新分支 HEAD 启动新构建。注意不要只重建旧构建记录。当前已用 showBuildSettings 验证 Release OTHER_LDFLAGS 包含 Swift compatibility force_load，并用 Xcode Cloud 同款 archive 参数验证通过。如果云端仍失败，优先展开 Fetch source code 确认 commit 是否为 f979f01，再展开 Run xcodebuild archive 子日志。
